## Checklist

- [ ] I signed all commits with DCO (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] I added/updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated docs for user-visible changes
- [ ] I verified `go test ./cmd/... ./internal/...` passes
- [ ] I verified `go build ./cmd/codewithphone ./cmd/daemon` passes
